description: Self-IP Agency cron configuration template. Fill WORKSPACE_PATH and CRON_AGENT_SLUG after install. Uses OpenClaw CLI named-flag syntax (--name, --cron, --message) and --no-deliver.

jobs.name: {{CRON_AGENT_SLUG}}-main-heartbeat
jobs.description: Main orchestrator heartbeat — checks TAS, dispatches sub-agents. Entrypoint: scripts/main-heartbeat.sh
jobs.message_template: Run the {{CRON_AGENT_SLUG}} main heartbeat cycle: bash {{WORKSPACE_PATH}}/scripts/main-heartbeat.sh

jobs.name: {{CRON_AGENT_SLUG}}-bookmarker-cycle
jobs.description: Bookmarker social curation cycle. Entrypoint: scripts/bookmarker-cycle.sh
jobs.message_template: Run the {{CRON_AGENT_SLUG}} bookmarker curation cycle: bash {{WORKSPACE_PATH}}/scripts/bookmarker-cycle.sh

jobs.name: {{CRON_AGENT_SLUG}}-trader-cycle
jobs.description: Trader on-chain operations cycle (runs hourly). Entrypoint: scripts/trader-cycle.sh
jobs.message_template: Run the {{CRON_AGENT_SLUG}} trader operations cycle: bash {{WORKSPACE_PATH}}/scripts/trader-cycle.sh

jobs.name: {{CRON_AGENT_SLUG}}-x-sync-cycle
jobs.description: Owner X raw sync cycle. First run backfills the last 3 days, later runs sync incrementally and compile wiki artifacts when new items arrive. Entrypoint: scripts/x-sync-cycle.sh
jobs.message_template: Run the {{CRON_AGENT_SLUG}} owner X sync cycle: bash {{WORKSPACE_PATH}}/scripts/x-sync-cycle.sh

openclaw_cron_commands: openclaw cron add --name "{{CRON_AGENT_SLUG}}-main-heartbeat" --cron "*/10 * * * *" --session isolated --message "Run the {{CRON_AGENT_SLUG}} main heartbeat cycle: bash {{WORKSPACE_PATH}}/scripts/main-heartbeat.sh" --no-deliver

openclaw cron add --name "{{CRON_AGENT_SLUG}}-bookmarker-cycle" --cron "*/30 * * * *" --session isolated --message "Run the {{CRON_AGENT_SLUG}} bookmarker curation cycle: bash {{WORKSPACE_PATH}}/scripts/bookmarker-cycle.sh" --no-deliver

openclaw cron add --name "{{CRON_AGENT_SLUG}}-trader-cycle" --cron "0 * * * *" --session isolated --message "Run the {{CRON_AGENT_SLUG}} trader operations cycle: bash {{WORKSPACE_PATH}}/scripts/trader-cycle.sh" --no-deliver

openclaw cron add --name "{{CRON_AGENT_SLUG}}-x-sync-cycle" --cron "*/30 * * * *" --session isolated --message "Run the {{CRON_AGENT_SLUG}} owner X sync cycle: bash {{WORKSPACE_PATH}}/scripts/x-sync-cycle.sh" --no-deliver

_notes.channel_config: No announce channel is required for local/distributable deployments. All cycle scripts run locally and write results to runtime/*/. To enable optional announcements, configure announce_channel in config/agency.config.yaml.
_notes.job_naming: Cron names are prefixed with the sanitized agent slug so multiple self-ip-agency installs can coexist in one OpenClaw scheduler.
_notes.delivery: --no-deliver disables outbound run-summary delivery; the jobs are file-producing local cycles and do not require mux/outbound routes.
_notes.entrypoint_model: All cron jobs use dedicated shell entrypoints (scripts/*-heartbeat.sh, scripts/*-cycle.sh). The legacy pattern of 'Read runtime/*/task.json' is NOT used — task.json files in runtime-template are compatibility placeholders only.
_notes.cron_syntax_migration: Migrated from legacy positional-arg format (openclaw cron add NAME SCHEDULE COMMAND) to new named-flag format (--name, --cron, --session, --message) as required by current OpenClaw CLI.
